data.title: RED test: gate-1b-feature-request-check.py behavioral tests
data.description:
Create tests/scripts/test_gate_1b_feature_request_check.py with pytest behavioral tests. Pipes JSON via subprocess stdin, asserts on stdout gate signal JSON.

Test corpus (15 cases):
1. test_doesnt_support — "doesn't support CSV export" -> triggered:true
2. test_missing_capability — "Missing OAuth capability" -> triggered:true
3. test_doesnt_accept — "doesn't accept YAML input" -> triggered:true
4. test_doesnt_handle — "doesn't handle bulk uploads" -> triggered:true
5. test_no_way_to — "No way to reset password" -> triggered:true
6. test_cant_yet — "Can't export to PDF yet" -> triggered:true
7. test_unable_to_new — "Unable to add new users" -> triggered:true
8. test_genuine_bug_crash — "App crashes when clicking save" -> triggered:false
9. test_genuine_bug_error — "500 error on login page" -> triggered:false
10. test_genuine_bug_regression — "Search stopped working after v2.3" -> triggered:false
11. test_domain_handle_false_positive — "Payment handler doesn't handle refunds correctly" -> triggered:false
12. test_regression_indicator_suppression — "App doesn't support dark mode anymore" -> triggered:false (regression indicator suppresses)
13. test_description_match — clean title, description has "missing X feature" -> triggered:true
14. test_emits_gate_signal_json — gate_id "1b", signal_type "primary"
15. test_empty_input — empty title/description -> triggered:false

Test approach: subprocess.run() with JSON stdin, assert on stdout JSON fields.

.test-index: plugins/dso/scripts/gate-1b-feature-request-check.py: tests/scripts/test_gate_1b_feature_request_check.py

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/scripts/test_gate_1b_feature_request_check.py
- [ ] At least 15 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'def test_' tests/scripts/test_gate_1b_feature_request_check.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 15)}'
- [ ] Tests use subprocess
  Verify: grep -q 'subprocess' tests/scripts/test_gate_1b_feature_request_check.py
- [ ] .test-index entry (source path as key)
  Verify: grep -q 'plugins/dso/scripts/gate-1b-feature-request-check.py' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
